channel.title: Special & "Characters" <Feed>
channel.description: Testing XML special characters & edge cases

item.title: Ampersands & Angles: A <Story>
item.description: Testing & (ampersand), < (less than), > (greater than), " (quote), and ' (apostrophe) in various fields.

item.title: Em Dash — En Dash – and Ellipsis…
item.description: Typography: "curly quotes", 'single curly', em dash—here, en dash 2–3, ellipsis…

item.title: Math Symbols: ∑ ∏ ∫ √ ∞ ≈ ≠ ≤ ≥
item.description: Mathematical symbols in a feed: π ≈ 3.14159, e ≈ 2.71828, √2 ≈ 1.41421

item.title: Null bytes and control chars
item.description: Tab: between words. Newline in description: second line here.
